non_blocking_followups: Add dedicated fast committed regression tests for root causes 2 and 3 (currently only covered by the multi-second capstone test), analogous to TestConcurrentInsertDeleteDisjointRangesMinimalRepro for root cause 1.

Revisit .cdr/memory/pending.md's 'no retry cap on TryLock restart-from-root loop' item -- this run's own throwaway 80k/200-goroutine plain-build reruns reproduced multi-minute non-terminating, actively-CPU-churning (not classically deadlocked) behavior, which is fresh empirical evidence the pre-existing risk can manifest, not just a theoretical concern.
